raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje wiꞥſch us tur-
ren/ us Najotu pee Rahmatas.
Un tas pats Deewa Gars nahze
arri us wiꞥſchu / un tas gahje ee-
dams un Praweeschu Wallodu
fluddinadams / teekams wiꞥſch
nahze us Najotu pee Rahmatas."
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch nowilke tur ar-
ri tawas Drehbes/ un fluddinaja
Praweeschu Wallodu Samueta
Breekſcha/ un wiꞥſch kritte kails
pee Semmes to zauru Deenu/
un zauru Nakti. Tapehz tohp
fazzihts: Irrag Sauls arri starp
teem Praweescheem?"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad behdse Dahwids no
Najota pee Rahmatas /
un nahze / un fazzija
preekſch Jonatanu : Ko eſmu es
darrijs? kas irr mans Noseegums?
un kas irr manni Grehki preekſch
tawa Tehwa/ ka wiꞥſch mannu
Dsihwibu mekle?"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija tas us wiꞥſu:
Ne muhscham / tu ne nomirfi.
Rangi/mans Tehws ne darra ne
kahdu leelu jeb masu Leetu / ko
wiꞥſch man papreekschu ne fazzi-
tu/ kadehtt tad buhtu mans Tehws
scho Leetu preekſch mannim ap-
flehpis? tas ta ne irr."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad swehreja Dahwids"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "wehl klahtu / un fazzija: Law
Tehws labbi sinna/ ka es Scheb
lastibu atraddis eſmu preekſch ta
wahm Azzim / tapehz dohm
wiꞥſch/ laid Jonatans neneeka ni
ta sinna/ ka tas pahr to ne ſeun
jahs. Un pateeji/ tik teefscham fi
tas KUNGS dsihwo / un taw
Dwebfele dsihwo / weens Soh
ween irr starp man / un starp t
Nahwi."
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jonatans u
Dahwidn : Ko tawa Dwebfe
fazzihs/ to es tew darrifchu."
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazzija us Jo
natanu: Rangi / rihtu irr ta
jauns Mehnes / ka man ar t
Kehnizu pee Galda jafehsch u
ja-ehd/ tad nu palaid man ka e
Launka apflepjohs lihds trefcha
Deenas Wakkaram."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja taws Tehws pehz man
ni waizahs/ tad fakki : Dahwid
luhdse man tik mihti / ka tan
Watta buhtu us sawu Pilssah
tu Betlemni tezzeht / jo tur ir
weens gadskahrtigs Uppurs wi
sam tam Raddam."
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ja nu wiꞥſch ta fazzihs
Tas irr labbi/ tad buhs taw
Kalps ar Meeru. Bet ja wiꞥſc
apſkaistahs pahr to/ tad warr t
vasiht/ ka wiꞥſch Launu apneb
mees."
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Darri tad Schehlastibu pe
tawa Kalpa/ jo tu eſti ar taw
Kalpu weenu Derribu ta KUN
GA darrijs. Bet ja kahds No
seegums pee mannim irr/ tad n
kauji tu mann / kapehz gribbet"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
